IMethodSet Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Base interface for method sets, a.k.a. API projects, a set of API methods and common properties.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IMethodSet

The IMethodSet type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AppId
Returns the name of the method set.
DisplayName
IsConfigured
Methods
Returns the set of methods in this method set.
Module
PlugIns
Returns the registered plug-ins for this method set.
Services
Provides a set of services specific to this API project.
SessionConfig
SessionOpened
Observable invoked every time a database session is authenticated.
Uid

Methods
  NameDescription
Configure
ConfigureSession

Remarks
The Configure(IResolve, IEnumerableIApiProvider) method must be called to correctly initialize this object.
